content_fingerprint: servicenow ai shares lessons from migrating vllm v0 to v1 correctness first corrections later researchers at servicenow ai have published a detailed account of their experience transitioning between vllm versions while training models with reinforcement learning finding that enforcing strict output correctness before iterating on reward shaping yielded more reliable downstream results the servicenow ai team has published a technical blog post on the hugging face community blog detailing their approach to navigating the vllm v0 to v1 transition during reinforcement learning rl training workflow
